title: BLUELIGHT RAT: YARA System Reconnaissance JSON (APT_MAL_Win_BlueLight)
description: Detects BLUELIGHT system reconnaissance data collection pattern. The malware collects UserName, ComName, OS, OnlineIP, LocalIP, Time, Compiled, Process Level, AntiVirus, and VM detection results in a specific JSON format and exfiltrates via OneDrive. Based on Volexity YARA rule APT_MAL_Win_BlueLight $msg strings.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Command Line' like '*ipinfo.io*') or (('Command Line' like '*"UserName":"*' or 'Command Line' like '*"ComName":"*' or 'Command Line' like '*"OnlineIP":"*' or 'Command Line' like '*"LocalIP":"*' or 'Command Line' like '*"AntiVirus":"*' or 'Command Line' like '*"Process Level":"*' or 'Command Line' like '*"VM":"*'))) | stats count by 'Host Name (Server)', Entity, 'Process Name'
falsepositives: Legitimate ipinfo.io lookups (common in DevOps tools)
The JSON field pattern combination is highly specific to BLUELIGHT
